channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference around utility cover 600x1000x20mm stats required number 1 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference by fire hydrate cover 600x300x23mm stats required number 1 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The silver birch tree has died, 23rd June
item.description:
On grass kerb outside 86 Leckhampton Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Leckhampton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp Post leaning., 23rd June
item.description:
Driver has reported that a lamp post is leaning in this road got 2 lamp post leaning to the road but one that is get it in from Farmington Road the first lamp post on Bisley road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Bisley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post of sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation approx 18 metres x3 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet
